response.step_by_step_log:
1. Identified Song 1 via on-screen text 'キラメキライダー☆' at 00:00. Used search query: '"キラメキライダー☆" hololive Japanese and English lyrics'.
2. Identified Song 2 via on-screen text '電脳ぴゅあ推し大宣言' at 02:49. Used search query: '"電脳ぴゅあ推し大宣言" hololive Japanese and English lyrics'.
3. Performer identification based on visual character analysis.
4. Compiled song metadata and representative lyrics for JSON output.
response.global_summary: A medley performance by various Hololive VTubers. The video features a performance of "Kirameki Rider" followed by an interlude and a performance of "Dennou Pure Oshi Daiseigen".

scenes.description: Three VTubers (Nakiri Ayame, Houshou Marine, Oozora Subaru) perform 'Kirameki Rider' on stage.
scenes.performer_in_video: Nakiri Ayame, Houshou Marine, Oozora Subaru
scenes.reference_lyrics_og:
生まれたてのドキドキを 響かせよう
最高の時間 最高の仲間と
キラメキに乗って (イェーイ!)
覚えてるかな? 最初の歌 (懐かしいね)
私 声が震えていた (ほんの少し)
あの日から...
scenes.reference_lyrics_en:
Let's make the excitement of being born sound out
With the best time and the best friends
Ride on the sparkle (Yeah!)
Do you remember? The first song (It's nostalgic)
My voice was shaking (Just a little)
Since that day...

scenes.description: A short dialogue/interlude between the two performances.
Four VTubers (Natsuiro Matsuri, Aki Rosenthal, Shirakami Fubuki, Akai Haato) perform 'Dennou Pure Oshi Daiseigen' on stage.
scenes.song_title: 電脳ぴゅあ推し大宣言
scenes.performer_in_video: Natsuiro Matsuri, Aki Rosenthal, Shirakami Fubuki, Akai Haato
scenes.reference_lyrics_og:
は～い、これから配信始めるよ
みんな観てる?
今回はコラボ配信!
あれ? あれれ～??
コメントの熱量、なんだか少なくない???
まだまだ足りないっ!!
こんなの...
scenes.reference_lyrics_en:
Hi! I'm going to start streaming now
Is everyone watching?
This time it's a collab stream!
Huh? Huhhh??
The enthusiasm of the comments, isn't it a bit low???
It's still not enough!!
Such things...
